profile.name: Mustafa Abdelrahman
profile.title: Electrical and Computer Engineering Student
profile.subtitle: VLSI · Data Analytics · Backend Engineering
profile.bio: Engineering student at KAU specializing in VLSI design and data-driven systems. Passionate about building things that matter — from silicon to software.

nodes.title: King Abdulaziz University
nodes.subtitle: B.Sc. Computer Engineering
nodes.description: Pursuing a Bachelor's in Computer Engineering. Focus areas include digital design, VLSI, embedded systems, and algorithms.

nodes.title: Meta Back-End Developer
nodes.subtitle: Professional Certificate
nodes.description: Completed Meta's Back-End Developer Professional Certificate covering Django, REST APIs, and database architecture.

nodes.title: Google Advanced Data Analytics
nodes.subtitle: Professional Certificate
nodes.description: Advanced Data Analytics by Google — statistical analysis, machine learning, and data storytelling.

nodes.title: VLSI Design Project
nodes.subtitle: CMOS ALU on 45nm
nodes.description: Designed a full 4-bit CMOS ALU using Cadence Virtuoso on a 45nm process node. Validated with Monte Carlo simulation.

nodes.title: Full-Stack Engineering
nodes.subtitle: Python · Next.js · FastAPI
nodes.description: Built full-stack applications combining Python backends with modern frontend frameworks and cloud deployments.

nodes.title: Capstone: Edge AI System
nodes.subtitle: FPGA + TensorFlow Lite
nodes.description: Final year project: deploying a pruned neural network onto an FPGA for real-time gesture recognition at <10ms latency.

projects.title: CMOS ALU Design
projects.description: Full 4-bit CMOS ALU designed at transistor level using Cadence Virtuoso on 45nm process. Monte Carlo yield analysis included.

projects.title: Real-Time Data Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end pipeline using Apache Kafka, Python, and BigQuery. Processes 50K+ events/minute for analytics dashboards.

projects.title: Edge AI Gesture System
projects.description: TensorFlow Lite model compressed and deployed onto FPGA for real-time hand gesture recognition with <10ms latency.
